translation.name: Install Android APK
translation.title: Install Aviator demo (Android APK)
translation.description: Download the Aviator Android APK, allow installs from your browser or file app, then install and turn on notifications for bonus and promo updates.
translation.content:
Install the Aviator demo (Android APK)

Installing from our APK gives you almost the same experience as installing Aviator from Google Play: the app works the same way after setup, and the only real difference is the installation method.

What you get

Use the Download APK button on this page to get the file. A direct install from our APK is designed to give you the same kind of app experience you expect from an official app: quick access to the Aviator demo and important updates in one place.

Download APK

Step by step

Step 1 — Download the APK

Tap Download APK above and save the file. When the download finishes, open it from the notification or from your Downloads / Files app.

Step 2 — Allow installation from this source

Android only installs the file if your device allows installs from the app you use to open the APK. Go to Settings → Apps → Special app access → Install unknown apps, then choose the app that opens the file, for example Chrome or Files, and turn on Allow from this source. If you do not see this exact path, open Settings → Security and look for a similar option for unknown sources or external installs for that same app.

Step 3 — Install, allow notifications, and open

Return to the downloaded file, start the install, and confirm. When the system asks, allow notifications so you can receive timely information about bonuses and promotions. When the installation finishes, open Aviator from the app drawer or your home screen.
